name: Aomiya Mizuha | Beast Blue Netori
description:
Non-stop Ntr November Day 5

Reworked Netori

You know my original plan of reworking was to reduce to token size yet somehow the token actually increased, how amazing.

Only 1 bot today because I'm exhausted

You can check out my other bots if you want to, have fun chatting.

Reviews/Feedbacks are greatly appreciated for future bots.
